workflows.name: Successful login redirects teacher to Dashboard
workflows.conditional_branch: Username != empty AND Password != empty AND credentials valid
workflows.on_success: redirects teacher to Dashboard

workflows.name: Login attempt with validly entered but incorrect credentials (authentication failure)
workflows.conditional_branch: Username != empty AND Password != empty AND credentials invalid
workflows.on_success: shows inline error message; clears Password field; retains Username field

workflows.name: Login attempt with missing required fields (empty Username or Password)
workflows.on_success: shows inline error message; clears Password field; retains Username field

workflows.name: Access the site as a guest
workflows.on_success: grants unauthenticated browsing

workflows.name: Open cookies usage information
workflows.on_success: shows cookie usage information

workflows.name: Select Time_Range that contains items (timeline populated)
workflows.on_success: Timeline displays activities within selected Time_Range

workflows.name: Select Time_Range that contains no items (timeline empty state)
workflows.on_success: when selected range contains no items, the timeline shows empty state

workflows.name: Change timeline Sort_Order
workflows.on_success: Timeline sorts activities by selected Sort_Order

workflows.name: Search activities in timeline
workflows.on_success: Timeline shows activities matching the search term (searches activities by name or type)
